entities.name: PEARL MILLET

entities.description: A primary region where pearl millet is grown as a staple food.

entities.description: A primary region where pearl millet is grown as a staple food.

entities.description: Nutritional component found in pearl millet.

entities.description: Nutritional component found in pearl millet.

entities.name: GLUTEN-FREE
entities.description: A health benefit attribute of pearl millet.

entities.description: A health benefit attribute of pearl millet.

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART CROP
entities.description: A crop capable of withstanding unpredictable variability in climate.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A biological trait used for the development of hybrid breeding systems.

entities.name: MAINTENANCE COUNTERPARTS SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used in conjunction with CMS for hybrid breeding.

entities.name: NUCLEAR FERTILITY RESTORATION GENES
entities.description: Genes used to restore fertility in hybrid breeding.

entities.description: A breeding method utilizing CMS and fertility restoration genes.

entities.name: DWARFING GENES
entities.description: Genes responsible for reducing the height of the plant.

entities.description: A physical characteristic resulting from dwarfing genes.

entities.name: IMPROVED INPUT RESPONSIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of the crop to respond better to agricultural inputs.

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD NEUTRALITY
entities.description: The ability of the crop to grow regardless of day length.

entities.name: SHORT GROWING SEASON
entities.description: A temporal constraint that photoperiod neutrality helps address.

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to resist important diseases.

entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand environmental stresses.

entities.description: Traits related to the nutritional value of the crop.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of enhancing crop traits to ensure food availability and quality.

entities.name: MOLECULAR TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to enhance selection efficiency and shorten phenotypic selection.

entities.name: LINKAGE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to detect quantitative trait loci.

entities.description: A method used to detect quantitative trait loci.

entities.description: Tools used in linkage analysis and genome-wide association studies.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with important agronomic traits.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Measurable characteristics of the crop used for improvement.
